# Node.js Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node
```

The workflow builds every pinned Node.js version for both `linux/amd64`
and `linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image pattern | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `node:<version>-bookworm-slim` | `latest`, `26`, `26.3.1` | Official runtime image with Debian or default upstream tooling. |
| `alpine` | `node:<version>-alpine` | `latest-alpine`, `26-alpine`, `26.3.1-alpine` | Official Alpine runtime image where upstream publishes one. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each release line also gets line aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node:<line>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node:<line>-alpine
```

The newest resolved version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/node:latest-alpine
```

## Status Meanings

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned version on the newest pinned release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned version on another current pinned line. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a current pinned release line. Kept for reproducibility. |
| Deprecated | Older release line. Kept only for legacy rebuilds. |

Node.js odd-numbered lines are short-lived. Prefer active LTS or current even-numbered releases for production.
